name: Brushcetta with Sun-Dried Tomatoes & Capers
recipeIngredient: 3 Ripe tomatoes, peeled, seeded and finely chopped
1 12-inch loaf Italian bread, cut into 24 slices
Grated nonfat Parmesan or Romano cheese (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Reconstitute the sun-dried tomatoes by placing them in a small bowl and pouring about 1 cup of boiling water over them. Let the tomatoes rest in the hot water until it cools, then drain and chop finely.
3. Combine all ingredients except the bread slices and cheese in a bowl and let set aside at room temperature for 1 hour.
4. Toast the bread slices in the oven until lightly brown; cool slightly.
5. Top with the tomato mixture. Sprinkle with Romano or Parmesan cheese if desired.
6. Serve warm or at room temperature.
Note: The robust flavors in this intense, concentrated spread are redolent of the Mediterranean. Try it also on vegetable sandwiches or add to pasta.
Serving size: 1 slice with 1 tablespoon spread
92 calories
0.3 gram fat
0 mg. cholesterol
239.1 mg. sodium without added salt
